voiceover.text: Eleven visitors came to her website over the weekend. Typed real questions. Waited. Got nothing. By Monday morning, every single one had moved on. Here's what most people miss: the website wasn't broken. It just couldn't answer. That silence isn't a tech problem — it's a revenue leak that compounds every week you stay offline after hours. Your next visitor is typing right now. Create your AI assistant — let your website answer while you're away.
